message:
feat(runtime): integrate LocaleContext into Program loop

Add locale-aware rendering support to the runtime's main Program struct:

- Add ftui-i18n dependency for Locale type
- Export locale module from ftui-runtime crate root
- Add LocaleContext and locale_version fields to Program struct
- Add check_locale_change() method that triggers re-render on locale switch
- Add with_locale() and with_locale_context() builder methods to ProgramConfig
- Remove unsafe env var tests from locale.rs (Rust 2024 forbids env::set_var)

This enables applications to dynamically change locale at runtime and
have the UI automatically re-render with the new translations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
